newsSince: No material company-specific news since June 9. The catalysts (Q1 reported May 5: record $265M sales +31.5%, backlog +94.6% YoY, AI-datacenter-driven demand, gross margin 30.1%) predate the June 9 baseline. The +14.49% move is flow/momentum, not new information.

sources.label: Hammond Power record 2025 sales / backlog (Globe & Mail)

verdicts.rankRationale: Hold the high-conviction #5 on the latent under-covered AI supply-chain lens. No new company news since June 9; the record Q1 (+31.5% sales, backlog +94.6%, AI-datacenter-driven) was already known. Direct transformer-shortage/data-centre exposure keeps the thesis intact, but the +14.5% pop signals it is getting more discovered, capping incremental fundamental delta at 0.
verdicts.bull: Direct transformer-shortage play; backlog +94.6% YoY gives strong AI-datacenter revenue visibility.
verdicts.neutral: Best-in-class niche power supplier; thesis intact but now well-flagged.
verdicts.bear: Small-cap, sharply rerated (+111% YTD); discovery rising, less 'latent' than the page wants.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Transformer backlog conversion; US data-centre/custom-engineered demand
verdicts.primaryRisk: Capacity/lead-time constraints; momentum unwind in a crowded small-cap
